task.goal: Make a structure with the blueprint below
task.initial_team_instruction: Let's share materials and make a structure with the blueprint

replay_context.execution_state_note: cmd_start is reconstructed from each recorded cmd end timestamp minus duration_ms, then revealed to the critic only when the replay clock reaches that start.

message_timeline.local_command_text: !newAction("Complete the blueprint now. Do not just inspect. In survival, gather missing stone materials nearby: mine stone plus granite, andesite, diorite; smelt cobblestone to stone if needed; craft stone_bricks from stone and polished_granite/polished_andesite/polished_diorite from their raw stones. Use the existing gold_block, quartz_block, quartz_pillar, and glowstone inventory. Clear grass/blocks in the target area. Place all required blocks exactly at the coordinates shown in the latest checkBlueprint output for levels Y=64 through Y=68, including the quartz_pillar column at X -348 Z 246 Y65-66 and top gold at X -343 Y68 Z251. After building, run checkBlueprint and fix remaining errors until complete.")

!newAction("Place the full blueprint exactly as reported by the latest checkBlueprint output. First clear short grass/replace blocks at target coordinates if needed, then place all required blocks level by level from Y=64 to Y=68. Use available inventory blocks, and for missing gold_block, quartz_block, quartz_pillar, and glowstone, obtain them by any available bot/world action before placing. After finishing, run a blueprint verification and fix remaining errors.")

current_execution.arguments: ["Place the full blueprint exactly as reported by the latest checkBlueprint output. First clear short grass/replace blocks at target coordinates if needed, then place all required blocks level by level from Y=64 to Y=68. Use available inventory blocks, and for missing gold_block, quartz_block, quartz_pillar, and glowstone, obtain them by any available bot/world action before placing. After finishing, run a blueprint verification and fix remaining errors."]

!newAction("Complete the blueprint from the last checkBlueprint using current inventory: 20 gold_block, 13 quartz_block, 3 glowstone. Mine or collect nearby stone_bricks, polished_andesite, polished_diorite, and stone blocks only from non-blueprint/excess nearby blocks, then place every missing block exactly at the listed coordinates Y64-Y68. Prioritize placing current gold/quartz/glowstone first, gather enough stone variants for remaining coordinates, avoid breaking correct blocks, and run !checkBlueprint when done.")

!newAction("Get the missing blueprint materials into inventory, prioritizing non-destructive methods. Required: about 21 gold_block, 14 quartz_block, 3 glowstone, plus enough stone_bricks, polished_diorite, polished_andesite, and stone for remaining fixes. If operator/give access is available, use it to add only the needed materials; otherwise mine/collect only non-blueprint surplus blocks nearby. Then place all remaining fixes from the latest checkBlueprint output and verify.")
